---
id: list-selectable-counterparties
title: "List selectable counterparties"
description: "Returns active external parties eligible for deal counterparty selection. Excludes type=group container nodes, which are organisational parents and cannot be used as booking counterparties."
sidebar_label: "List selectable counterparties"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List selectable counterparties"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/parties/counterparties"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns active external parties eligible for deal counterparty selection. Excludes type=group container nodes, which are organisational parents and cannot be used as booking counterparties.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./list-selectable-counterparties.RequestSchema.json")}
>
